name: Ronald Hove

education.title: Bachelor of Science (BSc) in Computer Science and Information Systems

about:
Hi 👋, I'm a computer scientist passionate about solving complex problems and building Industry-leading applications. I thrive in solo work, teamwork, or leadership roles, blending technical skills with product management and customer engagement.

My expertise spans software engineering, system architecture, API, and database design. I've worked across AWS, Azure, and GCP. Agile and always eager to innovate, I'm on a mission to make technology fun and impactful 🚀.
